mapper.select: SELECT category_id, category_code, category_name, icon_code, display_order, use_yn, created_at FROM CARD_CATEGORIES WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY display_order ASC
SELECT category_id, category_code, category_name, icon_code, display_order, use_yn, created_at FROM CARD_CATEGORIES WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CARD_CATEGORIES ( category_code, category_name, icon_code, display_order, use_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{iconCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{useYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), SYSTIMESTAMP )
